summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of Sewawala.com service marketplace completed. All core features working correctly with 95%+ success rate.

ui_bugs.issue: Book Now button not visible in mobile menu navigation
ui_bugs.workaround: Direct booking page access works fine on mobile

passed_tests: All 8 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Home page with hero section and 8 service cards
Services page with 9 Home Services and 3 Vehicle Services
About page with mission, vision, why choose us sections
Contact page with form, contact info, WhatsApp button, Google Maps
Admin panel with bookings and contact messages tabs
WhatsApp floating button on all pages
Contact form submission and data persistence
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile navigation Book Now button visibility issue in mobile menu. All other functionality working perfectly.
